etymology.description: Originally 隹(隹) (zhuī, "short-tailed bird") -> 唯(唯) (wéi, "only") with 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") added -> phonetic 唯(唯) (wéi, "only") + semantic 鳥(鳥) (niǎo, "bird") = cry of a bird
etymology.interpretation: The character 鷕(yǎo, "cry of a bird") evolved from 鳥(鳥) (niǎo, "bird") to depict the cry of a bird, using 唯(唯) (wéi, "only") as the phonetic component to suggest the sound of a bird's cry.
